# Ivabradine Hydrochloride 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ivabradine Hydrochloride 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ivabradine Hydrochloride</strong> 目前有 <strong>42 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ivabradine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Symptomatic treatment of chronic stable angina pectoris Ivabradine is indicated for the symptomatic treatment of chronic stable angina pectoris in coronary artery disease adults with normal sinus...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（99.7%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（99.7%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（99.7%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（99.7%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.1%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.5%）</li>
<li>familial isolated trichomegaly（98.4%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>leprosy（98.0%）</li>
<li>benign prostatic hyperplasia (disease)（97.7%）</li>
<li>persistent Mullerian duct syndrome（96.3%）</li>
<li>genetic alopecia（96.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（95.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（95.8%）</li>
<li>pneumocystosis（95.3%）</li>
<li>mycotic corneal ulcer（95.2%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（95.1%）</li>
<li>familial clubfoot due to 17q23.1q23.2 microduplication（95.1%）</li>
<li>anomalous left coronary artery from the pulmonary artery（95.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ivabradine-hydrochloride/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
